ast.name: textContent
ast.target: 悬停或使用方向键调整大小

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Most shortcuts work only while editing in a Butter view. Obsidian's own hotkeys still apply in source / live preview.
ast.target: 大多数快捷键仅在 Butter 视图中编辑时有效。Obsidian 自身的快捷键在源码模式/实时预览模式下仍然适用。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Useful for git-tracked vaults or hand-formatted notes. Find the toggle and related normalizers under the Advanced tab.
ast.target: 适用于 Git 跟踪的保险库或手动格式化的笔记。相关开关和格式化器位于“高级”选项卡下。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: can't be opened right now because another process on your device is locking it. Most likely: VS Code with the file open · antivirus mid-scan · another Obsidian window.
ast.target: 当前无法打开，因为设备上的另一个进程正在锁定它。最可能的原因是：VS Code 打开了该文件 · 杀毒软件正在扫描 · 另一个 Obsidian 窗口。

ast.name: error
ast.source: [butter-pmx] parseWithSourceMap threw - falling back to raw_block. Input length:
ast.target: [butter-pmx] parseWithSourceMap 抛出异常 - 回退到 raw_block。输入长度：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [butter-pmx] raw_block disappeared from PM doc but was in loaded doc - refusing to save, returning original bytes to prevent source loss.
ast.target: [butter-pmx] raw_block 从 PM 文档中消失，但存在于已加载的文档中 - 拒绝保存，返回原始字节以防止源丢失。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Paste your key in settings → license.
ast.target: 请在设置 → 许可证中粘贴您的密钥。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Opens the Butter README on GitHub. Feature descriptions with screenshots and GIFs.
ast.target: 在 GitHub 上打开 Butter 的 README。包含功能描述、截图和 GIF 动图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Confirming with the licensing server. This usually takes a few seconds.
ast.target: 正在与许可证服务器确认。通常需要几秒钟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If activation is stuck, complete it in a browser as a fallback.
ast.target: 如果激活卡住，可在浏览器中完成作为备选方案。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Thanks for buying Butter - yours, forever.
ast.target: 感谢购买 Butter - 永久属于您。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this is unexpected, get in touch and we'll sort it.
ast.target: 如果这是意外情况，请联系我们，我们会解决。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: We can't reach the server right now. Your cached license keeps Butter running.
ast.target: 目前无法连接服务器。您的缓存许可证可让 Butter 继续运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 正在与许可证服务器验证。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Device ID, key prefix, plugin version, and server URL for support tickets.
ast.target: 用于支持工单的设备 ID、密钥前缀、插件版本和服务器 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skips worker validation. Each button writes a coherent settings shape and re-renders the tab.
ast.target: 跳过工作线程验证。每个按钮会写入一个连贯的设置形状并重新渲染选项卡。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Calls the real worker /session endpoint with the current key + deviceId.
ast.target: 使用当前密钥和设备 ID 调用真实的工作线程 /session 端点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clears all license data on this device + regenerates deviceId.
ast.target: 清除此设备上的所有许可证数据并重新生成设备 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markdown files open directly in Butter. Reload Obsidian after toggling.
ast.target: Markdown 文件直接在 Butter 中打开。切换后请重新加载 Obsidian。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Entrance fades, drag springs, hint transitions, and other motion polish. Turn off for slower machines, accessibility, or screen recordings.
ast.target: 入场淡入、拖拽弹性、提示过渡和其他动态效果。为较慢的机器、辅助功能或屏幕录制关闭此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show toolbar buttons for marks that can only be written as inline HTML in source: text color, custom highlight color, underline, superscript, subscript, keyboard key. Turn off to keep your source pure Markdown. Existing HTML in files is still read and round-tripped either way.
ast.target: 显示只能在源代码中以内联 HTML 形式写入的标记的工具栏按钮：文本颜色、自定义高亮颜色、下划线、上标、下标、键盘按键。关闭此选项可保持源代码为纯 Markdown。文件中现有的 HTML 仍会被读取并双向转换。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Attached sits as a chrome row at the edge of the pane. Detached floats as a card inside the editor.
ast.target: 附着模式作为边框行位于窗格边缘。分离模式作为卡片浮动在编辑器内。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Top: pins above the editor content. Bottom: pins below.
ast.target: 顶部：固定在编辑器内容上方。底部：固定在下方。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Native matches Obsidian's mobile bar. Butter is taller, with accent pills and backdrop blur.
ast.target: 原生模式匹配 Obsidian 的移动栏。Butter 模式更高，带有强调色药丸和背景模糊。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How active formatting buttons are highlighted.
ast.target: 活动格式化按钮的高亮显示方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When the bottom toolbar overlaps the status bar, hovering toolbar buttons fades the status bar so they're reachable.
ast.target: 当底部工具栏与状态栏重叠时，悬停工具栏按钮会使状态栏淡出，以便它们可被点击。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use Butter's outline sidebar instead of the core outline plugin. The core plugin is disabled while this is on and restored when off.
ast.target: 使用 Butter 的大纲侧边栏代替核心大纲插件。开启此功能时，核心插件将被禁用，关闭时会恢复。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Drag animation feel. Springy bounces; Snappy is direct; Smooth is steady.
ast.target: 拖拽动画感觉。弹性模式有弹跳；快速模式直接；平滑模式稳定。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When the gutter drag handle appears. Hover: only on the pointed-at block. Always: stays on the nearest block.
ast.target: 拖拽手柄何时出现。悬停：仅在指向的块上。始终：保持在最近的块上。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Triple-backtick is the convention; tildes are valid CommonMark too.
ast.target: 三重反引号是惯例；波浪号也是有效的 CommonMark。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Untouched blocks are written back verbatim from the file you opened: whitespace, marker style, indentation, and blank-line counts all preserved. Edited blocks are still re-serialized canonically.
ast.target: 未修改的块会从您打开的文件中逐字写回：空白、标记样式、缩进和空行数均保持不变。编辑过的块仍会按规范重新序列化。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a blank line between a heading and the next block if they're touching. Existing gaps are left alone. Respects fenced code blocks.
ast.target: 如果标题和下一个块紧挨着，则在它们之间添加一个空行。现有的间距保持不变。尊重围栏代码块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cap runs of 2+ blank lines at 1 on save. Respects fenced code blocks.
ast.target: 在保存时将连续 2 个或更多空行限制为 1 个。尊重围栏代码块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Append a closing fence when the file ends mid-fence. Prevents later edits from being swallowed when parsers extend the fence to end-of-file. Top-level fences only.
ast.target: 当文件在围栏中间结束时，附加一个闭合围栏。防止后续编辑在解析器将围栏扩展到文件末尾时被吞掉。仅适用于顶级围栏。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Log internal events to the dev-tools console with a `[butter:...]` prefix. Filter by `butter:` in the console filter box.
ast.target: 使用 `[butter:...]` 前缀将内部事件记录到开发工具控制台。在控制台过滤框中输入 `butter:` 进行过滤。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 显示为子菜单的工具提示。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 离线 · 使用缓存许可证

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 Butter 中打开笔记

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Fade status bar on toolbar hover
ast.target: 工具栏悬停时淡出状态栏

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 逐字节保留原始源代码

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Normalize heading gap to 1 blank line
ast.target: 将标题间距规范化为 1 个空行

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 关闭未闭合的代码围栏

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto-split full-width images into their own block
ast.target: 自动将全宽图像拆分为独立块

ast.name: setText
ast.target: Butter - 保存时结构规范化

ast.name: setText
ast.target: Butter 编辑器键盘快捷键

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Click a card to continue. Press esc to dismiss with plain Markdown as the default.
ast.target: 点击卡片继续。按 Esc 键以纯 Markdown 格式关闭。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Most-recent error first. Long-press to copy, paste into a bug report. The buffer holds the last 50 entries; older ones are discarded.
ast.target: 最近的错误优先显示。长按可复制，粘贴到错误报告中。缓冲区保留最近50条记录；更早的记录将被丢弃。

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在 Butter 编辑器中打开

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 切换到 Butter 编辑器

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [butter-pmx] parse did not cover every byte of input
ast.target: [butter-pmx] 解析未能覆盖输入的每个字节

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [butter] 设备停用服务器调用失败：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reorder is unavailable on tables with merged cells.
ast.target: 在包含合并单元格的表格上无法重新排序。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't copy - your browser blocked clipboard access.
ast.target: 无法复制 - 您的浏览器阻止了剪贴板访问。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Session expired - re-paste your key to refresh.
ast.target: 会话已过期 - 请重新粘贴密钥以刷新。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Couldn't copy - clipboard access was blocked.
ast.target: 无法复制 - 剪贴板访问被阻止。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A trial has already been activated on this device. Reset state under device if you're testing.
ast.target: 此设备已激活试用。如果您正在测试，请在设备下重置状态。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Reload Obsidian for this change to take full effect.
ast.target: 请重新加载 Obsidian 以使此更改完全生效。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: File no longer exists in vault.
ast.target: 文件在保险库中已不存在。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Recovery link is missing the license key.
ast.target: 恢复链接缺少许可证密钥。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum cross-app compatibility. Font color, inline styles, and other HTML extras stay off so your files read cleanly anywhere and version-control diffs stay tidy.
ast.target: 最大限度的跨应用兼容性。字体颜色、内联样式和其他 HTML 附加功能保持关闭，以便您的文件在任何地方都能清晰阅读，版本控制差异也能保持整洁。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If you just want to color and style your notes how you want without worrying about markdown source then use this preset. This mixes some HTML into your note under the hood; invisible to you but some don't prefer that.
ast.target: 如果您只想按照自己的喜好为笔记着色和设置样式，而不必担心 Markdown 源代码，请使用此预设。这会在底层将一些 HTML 混入您的笔记中；对您不可见，但有些人不喜欢这样。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Obsidian's default editor - markdown with inline rendering.
ast.target: Obsidian 的默认编辑器 - 带有内联渲染的 Markdown。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: Butter 的所见即所得编辑器（此插件）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Every Butter feature, organized into submenus.
ast.target: 所有 Butter 功能，整理到子菜单中。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 精选的拇指友好型按钮栏。

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 精选的拇指友好型表格按钮。

ast.name: label
ast.target: 切换 Butter / Markdown 视图

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open current note in WYSIWYG view
ast.target: 在所见即所得视图中打开当前笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Switch back to default Markdown view
ast.target: 切换回默认 Markdown 视图

ast.name: name
ast.target: 整理当前笔记中的空白字符

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rewrite current note in canonical form
ast.target: 以规范形式重写当前笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rewrite entire vault in canonical form (irreversible - Git commit first)
ast.target: 以规范形式重写整个保险库（不可逆 - 请先 Git 提交）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 之前（磁盘上的原始字节）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 之后（Butter 刚刚写入的字节）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Edit your notes the way they look in reading mode. Bold is bold, headings are big, lists have bullets. No syntax noise while you write.
ast.target: 以阅读模式的外观编辑笔记。粗体就是粗体，标题就是大字，列表自带项目符号。写作时没有语法噪音。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Butter editor keeps your files clean and readable so they work with any Markdown app.
ast.target: Butter 编辑器保持您的文件干净易读，使其能与任何 Markdown 应用兼容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: One question shapes how Butter behaves. Pick whichever option fits how you think about your notes. You can change it later in settings.
ast.target: 一个核心问题决定了 Butter 的行为方式。选择最符合您思考笔记习惯的选项。您稍后可以在设置中更改。

ast.name: text
ast.source: How should Butter treat your source?
ast.target: Butter 应如何处理您的源文件？

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can revisit this choice - along with Butter's other settings - anytime under settings → Butter editor → general.
ast.target: 您可以随时在 设置 → Butter 编辑器 → 常规 中重新审视此选择以及 Butter 的其他设置。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在 GitHub 上了解更多

ast.name: text
ast.source: This will update the following settings:

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can change individual settings at any time. Presets are a fast path; they don't lock anything in.
ast.target: 您可以随时更改单个设置。预设是快速路径；它们不会锁定任何内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can apply any preset later to return to a known baseline. This is just a heads-up so the change doesn't surprise you.
ast.target: 您稍后可以应用任何预设以返回已知基线。这只是提前通知，以免更改让您措手不及。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Custom: your bundled settings don't match any preset. Apply one below to return to a known baseline.
ast.target: 自定义：您捆绑的设置与任何预设都不匹配。请应用下方的一个预设以返回已知基线。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Best for keeping your files exactly as written.
ast.target: 最适合保持您的文件原样不变。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No active license on this device.
ast.target: 此设备上没有有效的许可证。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Empty submenu - add buttons via their Move actions.
ast.target: 空子菜单 - 通过移动操作添加按钮。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You're turning on a setting that automatically modifies file source on save. Files with non-matching formatting will get a one-time diff the next time they're saved.
ast.target: 您正在开启一个设置，该设置会在保存时自动修改文件源。格式不匹配的文件在下次保存时将获得一次性的差异比较。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is an advanced feature. Most Butter users want the default (source is truth) so they can move freely between Butter, live preview, and source without their files being rewritten.
ast.target: 这是一个高级功能。大多数 Butter 用户希望使用默认设置（源文件为真），这样他们可以在 Butter、实时预览和源文件之间自由切换，而无需重写文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Continue only if you understand you're opting into automatic source changes.
ast.target: 仅在您理解您正在选择自动更改源文件的情况下继续。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Butter editor will switch to read-only mode here until you re-add the device.
ast.target: Butter 编辑器将在此处切换为只读模式，直到您重新添加设备。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 试用已过期 - 只读模式

ast.name: text
ast.source: Get full access to keep editing in Butter.
ast.target: 获取完全访问权限以继续在 Butter 中编辑。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Read-only until the licensing server can be reached.
ast.target: 在能够连接到许可证服务器之前为只读模式。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 需要许可证 - 只读模式

ast.name: text
ast.source: Start a free trial or paste a license key to enable editing.
ast.target: 开始免费试用或粘贴许可证密钥以启用编辑。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Another app is using this file
ast.target: 另一个应用正在使用此文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: No errors recorded since plugin load. Things look good.
ast.target: 自插件加载以来未记录到错误。一切正常。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This operation is not undoable from inside Butter. Strongly recommended: commit your vault to Git first, so you have a recovery point if a file's canonical form turns out to be unexpected.
ast.target: 此操作在 Butter 内部无法撤销。强烈建议：首先将您的保险库提交到 Git，这样如果文件的规范形式出现意外，您就有恢复点。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Files that fail to parse will be skipped and reported. Files already in canonical form will not be touched (no spurious mtime bumps).
ast.target: 解析失败的文件将被跳过并报告。已经是规范形式的文件将不会被修改（不会产生无意义的修改时间更新）。
